name: domino
description: Record a meeting, synthesize a repo-grounded implementation plan, and optionally execute it.

interface.longDescription: Standalone Codex plugin for recording a meeting, synthesizing a repo-grounded plan, and optionally executing it on a branch.
defaultPrompt: Use Domino to start a meeting recording.
Use Domino to check the current meeting recording status.
Use Domino to stop the active meeting and prepare plan.md.
